results.title: Wes Adams
highlights:
Lead Scientist, AI Developer, and
...
Data Science Manager at [FedEx Freight](https://www.linkedin.com/company/fedex-freight)
...
Data Scientist and generalist with skills in machine learning, deep learning, artificial intelligence (AI) and large language models (LLMs), business insight and visualization, project leadership, data modeling, tool development, statistical analysis, process engineering, and economic analysis. I have substantial business experience with Python, Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence, SQL, R, SAS, statistical modeling, and more. I will be finishing a Masters in Data Science from The University of Texas at Austin in 2024. In 2017, I graduated Summa Cum Laude with a Bachelor of Science degree in Chemical Engineering from The University of Tennessee at Knoxville. Before changing my career path to work with data and process engineering, I gained experience in chemical production plants, where I specialized in reliability, process improvements, cost-cutting, and project design. I also gained some exposure to FMEA, Six Sigma, Design for Reliability, and Continuous Improvement.

### AI ML Engineer at [FedEx](https://www.linkedin.com/company/fedex) (Current)
...
Architected production RAG pipeline connecting LLM inference to live FedEx shipment, ETA, and customs APIs — replaced stale cached responses with real-time data grounding, contributing to 80% first-call resolution across 6.7M+ annual conversations Replaced legacy rule-based NLP with fine-tuned BERT intent classification + NER — expanded coverage to 20+ intent categories (tracking, scheduling, returns, customs) and eliminated misrouted escalations to human agents Deployed multilingual NLP at scale: Extended system to 15 languages across 79 countries via mBERT and multilingual T5 pipelines — zero classification quality loss on non-English inputs, no language-specific model variants required Engineered LLM prompt frameworks and few-shot templates for tracking, scheduling, and policy flows — reduced hallucination rates and lifted response relevance across all customer-facing query types Built end-to-end MLOps infrastructure for production LLM deployments — CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes, A/B testing tied to FCR and CSAT, drift/latency monitoring on AWS and Azure — zero unplanned rollbacks across full deployment lifecycle
...
FedEx (FDX) is a Freight and Package Transportation company. FedEx is a logistics and customer service company that offers career opportunities in logistics, customer service, technology, and more. They are a B2B company. FedEx employs 53,471 people and has an annual revenue of $87.9B, founded in 1973. Headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, United States, operates in 174 countries (including Brazil, Canada, India, United Kingdom, and France). Has a $63.9B market cap. IPO 1978.

results.title: Saeid Rasti
highlights:
Data Scientist Lead at FedEx Dataworks
...
Data Scientist Lead at [FedEx Dataworks](https://www.linkedin.com/company/fedex-dataworks)
...
My passion is to deliver value by solving problems. My approach is to integrate business knowledge, data, and the scientific method to discover new contextual insights that create an impact. I believe that all by combining operations research and machine learning we can make a huge business value by data-driven decision making. I have been recognized at FedEx through Five Star Awards - the top recognition for business impact. A native of Iran, I earned a bachelor's degree in Engineering from Bu-Ali Sina university, master’s degree in industrial engineering from Science and Technology university of Mazandaran and a PhD in industrial engineering (research field: operations research) from the North Dakota State University. My contributions have been published in premier journals including Networks, Computer and Operations Research, and Anals of OR.

In this project, I • Forecasted the sales of a company using machine learning (ML), time series analysis, and R software. • Created a database to save the sales of different branches of a company using mySQL software. • Extracted historical monthly sales data from dataset. • Developed a SARIMA model with trend and seasonality to forecast sales. • Developed a least square method and reject it, because white noise assumption for the residuals was not valid. • Applied semiparametric smoothing method for estimating trend and seasonality and showed that the residuals are not IID sequence. • Checked validity of Loess smoothing method as the next method and showed that white noise assumption was not valid for this model, as well. • Proposed SARIMA model to capture the residuals, since the
...
of the fitted models were not IID N(0, σ^2). • Showed that fitted SARIMA using auto.arima was not a good fit because the
...
were not normally distributed. • Developed a SARIMA model and adjust the parameters by hand and showed that the
...
were IID N(0, σ^2). • Used 90% of
...
original dataset as training set to fit a SARIMA model and use the
...
10% to evaluate the accuracy

### Operations Research Scientist I at [FedEx Freight](https://www.linkedin.com/company/fedex-freight) (Current)
...
– Managed development of complex data analytics and optimization modelling based Decision Support Tool for pharmacy accessibility. Developed location-allocation MILP model in Gurobi and conducted multivariate statistical analysis in python. Improved accessibility & provided guidance to policymakers for resource allocation. – Analyzed health-seeking behavior in a population network. Designed a conditional logit model in R and developed an agent-based simulation model in AnyLogic integrated with a GIS-based transportation network. Highlighted areas of improvement, assisting policymakers and businesses in making informed decisions. – Conducted feature engineering, time series analysis, and anomaly detection using highway pavement quality data in Python. Developed ensemble-based machine learning models to predict human ratings using automatic laser crack measurement data. Achieved a prediction accuracy of 88%, resulting in an approx. annual cost saving of 30% – Communicated the optimization, simulation, and ML products through oral presentations and written reports to technical and non-technical audiences. Secured 2nd position among 50 participants in a competition.
...
I am a Ph.D. candidate in the Department of Industrial Engineering and working as a Graduate Research Assistant in the Logistics and Distribution Institute (LoDI) lab at the University of Louisville. My research focuses on building an optimization model to integrate shared mobility services and e-commerce companies for last-mile delivery. I am also working on a research project "Machine Learning Model to Predict Pavement Conditions using LCMS Data" funded by Kentucky Transportation Cabinet (KYTC).

### Data Scientist Lead at [FedEx Dataworks](https://www.linkedin.com/company/fedex-dataworks) (Current)
...
Leading the model development for Delivery Time Window estimation:
...
- Tackling delivery window estimation in an evolving network where statistical and deep learning models proved ineffective.
- Decomposed a complex optimization problem into smaller subproblems, applying machine learning and greedy algorithms alongside vectorized operations ensuring scale, speed and high accuracy.
- Replaced large-scale route simulations with quadratic regression and least squares, achieving higher accuracy and scale.
...
- Rapid-prototyped the full solution in 2 days using generative AI, delivering over 1,200 lines of production-grade code.
- Achieved over 50% improvement in delivery window accuracy. Show less
...
### Revenue Science Advisor (Data Science & Optimization) at FedEx Services
...
Problem Solving with Large Language Models (Stanford University):
...
- Developed a novel memory and retrieval architecture for LLM agents, integrating working and long-term memories.
- Demonstrated that LLMs equipped with multi-modal perception, memory, and code generation tools can develop creative solutions, for problems ranging from supply chain optimization to personal assistance. Led the development of time-series anomaly detection platform, to identify customer churn:
...
- Trained Autoencoder models to identify anomalies.
- Developed a clustering algorithm using piecewise linear trend approximation, outperforming DTW on benchmark datasets.
- Introduced a novel feature engineering approach for ML models with temporal dimension by identifying change points. Show less

- Network optimization using mathematical and heuristic methods. Show less

# Data Scientist Advisor
...
Provides expert leadership at the enterprise level related to vast quantities of data (including disparate data), enterprise analytics, statistical modeling, and initiatives and works on the leading edge of technology, tools, and methodology to ensure that FedEx is a leader in Business and Artificial Intelligence. Leads lower level Data Scientists in descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, prescriptive and ensemble modeling, advanced statistical techniques, use of database tools and/or other approaches in quantitative analysis of complex business situations. Creates and implements solutions from initial concept to fully tested production and communicates results to a broad range of audiences. Expert in the use of all data types, statistical and quantitative analysis, explanatory and high- complexity predictive modeling and fact-based management to drive decision making. Leads cross functional projects and programs. Routinely works on multiple highly complex assignments concurrently.

highlights:
Associate CASS Data Scientist | Wfh
...
# Associate CASS Data Scientist
...
As an Associate CASS Data Scientist, you’ll help drive the analytical backbone of Southwest’s Continuing Analysis and Surveillance System (CASS), turning complex operational data into insights that strengthen safety, compliance, and reliability. You’ll develop automated workflows, build models, and apply advanced analytics—including machine learning and AI—to detect trends, assess risk, and optimize the health of our Continuous Airworthiness Maintenance Program. Partnering closely with Tech Ops, CASS Leadership, and cross‑functional stakeholders, you’ll create dashboards and predictive tools that inform critical decisions and support the ongoing improvement of our maintenance programs. By blending strong analytical methods with real‑world operational understanding, you’ll play a key role in ensuring our fleet stays safe, efficient, and ready to serve our Customers.

results.title: Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
...
# Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist
...
The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.
...
- As a Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI within Cotiviti you will be responsible for delivering solutions that help our clients identify payment integrity issues, reduce the cost of healthcare processes, or improve the quality of healthcare outcomes. You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.
...
- Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Operations, along with product management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques.
...
- Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases.
...
- Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work.
...
- Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA.
...
- Work with production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance.
...
- Participate in other data science teams collaborating with your peers to support their projects.
...
- Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team.
...
- Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform.
...
- Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption.
...
- Qualifications
- PhD or Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI.
- Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases.
...
- 9+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU.
...
- Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
...
- Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets.
...
- Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus.
...
- Passion for collaboration, learn it all mindset and driving value with AI.
